Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Dream Bind
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +27% (augmented)
Pack Size: +25% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +25% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +110% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 82
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Thunderous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 16(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Lightning
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
18(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Venomous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 28(27-33)% chance to Poison on Hit
{ Prefix Modifier "Profane" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 16(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Chaos
{ Suffix Modifier "of Exposure" (Tier: 1) }
-8(-8--6)% maximum Player Resistances
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Unwavering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 71(70-79)% increased Ailment Threshold
Monsters have 62(60-69)% increased Stun Threshold
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 30(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
